# [Project Name]

> [Replace with a concise one-to-two sentence description of your project and its purpose.]

Replace with additional context about your project goals and background.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, setup instructions, and development workflow
- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): Guidelines for contributing to the project
- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community standards and expectations
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): History of notable changes across releases

## Architecture

- [Architecture Overview](docs/architecture/README.md): High-level system design and component relationships
- [Decision Records](docs/decisions/README.md): Architectural decision records (ADRs) documenting key design choices
- [Folder Structure](docs/architecture/structure.md): Explanation of the directory layout and module organization

## API

- [API Reference](docs/api/README.md): Public interfaces, component props, and hook signatures
- [Data Models](docs/api/models.md): Shared data types and schema definitions

## Specifications

- [Requirements](docs/specs/requirements.md): Functional and non-functional requirements
- [Technical Specification](docs/specs/technical.md): Detailed technical constraints and implementation guidelines

## Contributing

- [Development Setup](docs/contributing/setup.md): Steps to set up the local development environment
- [Coding Standards](docs/contributing/standards.md): Style guide and code quality expectations
- [Testing Guide](docs/contributing/testing.md): How to write and run tests

## Optional

- [Security Policy](SECURITY.md): Vulnerability disclosure and security guidelines
- [License](LICENSE): Project license terms
